description_long: This is a double swing set featuring two individual swings suspended from a sturdy, arched metal frame. The frame is painted blue and consists of two vertical support posts connected by a large, semi-circular top bar. Each swing seat is made of brown slats, likely wood or composite, and is attached to the frame with metal chains. The design is open, allowing easy access from the front and back, and the swings hang freely for back-and-forth motion. The structure is robust and intended for outdoor playground use, providing seating for two children at a time. There are no visible safety barriers or shade structures integrated into the design.
description: A blue arched metal swing set with two brown slatted seats suspended by chains, designed for playground use. The structure is open and sturdy, accommodating two users simultaneously.
description_view_0: Front view showing both swings, the arched blue frame, and the brown slatted seats clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the arched frame and the alignment of the two swings in a row.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both swings and the arched frame visible from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the frame and the two swings aligned.
